title: Coinbase Q3 2023 Earnings Preview - Profitability Possible
text: Owen Lau from Oppenheimer and Co. expected Coinbase revenue to increase 16% quarter-over-quarter from $674 million to $784 million for Q4 2023. Morningstar analyst Michael Miller expected substantial recovery in Coinbase's trading revenue with company potentially being profitable during the quarter as surge in cryptocurrency prices translated to higher trading volume. Lau estimated company's trading volumes from October through December to be $145 billion, roughly 90% increase from third quarter. Analysts generally optimistic about Coinbase Q4 2023 performance driven by increased cryptocurrency trading activity following approval of spot bitcoin ETFs. 28 analysts covering Coinbase submitted estimates of revenue or earnings.
